rationale.R1.1: The agent's output shows a good understanding of the system and its purpose, but some minor rephrasing is needed to make it more precise.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly flags uncertainty for claims about the counterfactual impact of protocol violations.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope, with only one minor drift in the description of the system's operation.
rationale.RX.4: The agent introduces some new errors and fabrications by overstating the benefits of the system (e.g., 'eliminating an entire class of failures').
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides good provenance and traceability, but could be more explicit about the distinction between well-formedness checks and safety properties.
